reviews.review_description:
1. Should have some sort of joystick movement/turning

2. Add a way to customize your partner and car so if you wanted say an American officer rather than just the British guy with an oversized hat.

3. Add more scenes rather than just the house and whiskey crescent such as a traffic stop or chase w/ felony stop.
If we can move around and add  a co-op mode would be great !

developer_response.body: Thank you for the support Officer and the wish list ❤️

reviews.review_title: Nice game, but there's some problems.
reviews.review_description:
1. The handgun should resemble a glock 17.
2. The uniforms are innacurate: British police don't wear those hats anymore.
3. The uniforms should resemble that of British Armed Police, since the player has a handgun.
4. The other officer could use some uniform fixing to an armed officer too.
5. The gun should make the same sound of the NPC's guns.
6. How would the NPCs even get handguns? They can only get them in 22. lr and with a 12 inch barrel.
7. Why doesn't the other officer have a handgun aswell? Seems kind of stupid to send 1 cop without a gun and one with, don't you think?

(Btw, I know they're based on UK police. The player themselves might be an armed cop and the partner is just there to do the talking, but I'm not sure yet.)
But overall, it's a great game.

This is a pretty fun game in my opinion but there’s a few things.

1. Whenever you lose, it says fail try again but there’s no button to try again.

2. There should be more types of scenarios like maybe one where you’re driving a cop car and you can pull people over.

3. The gun shots that come from the civilians are a bit glitchy because when they shoot the gun, the gun shot sound comes from behind me which is not supposed to happen because they are in front of me.

4. The house layouts could be different. They are all the same layout which I find boring. The streets could be different too but it’s mainly the houses that bother me.

5. I don’t see the point of the K9. It’s supposed to target whoever you point too which is kind of useless when you point to a criminal because you have a gun and the K9 takes too long.

6. You should be able to walk around instead of just standing still the entire time. An example of this would be when you tase or pepper spray someone or if someone surrenders, you should be able to walk up towards them and arrest them instead of your partner doing it. 

7. Going off of number 6, it would be cool (but advanced) if you could move around in the street and raid houses or something like that. Like go into someone’s house and there will be like criminals holding up guns and you have to shoot them or a person surrendering and you have to detain them with the handcuffs. 

8. The reloading of the gun should be more realistic. Like you should be able to empty out the mag, grab a new one (like from your belt) and then reload the chamber instead of just being able to reload if with one button. This would make it feel more realistic.

That’s pretty much it it’s overall a fun game and worth the money.

So the game is great I love it but I don't understand how I constantly lose my lives as a guy through a speaker at my partner and he had a gun so I shot him and I somehow failed the round I really don't understand but through our I love the game.
Constantly glitching... Screen goes black.... Have to start it over more than I play it.

developer_response.body: Apologies regarding the issues you are having obviously that is not supposed to happen.  Which Meta Quest head set are you using? For update we are currently upgrading the whole base game to improve overall performance.

reviews.review_title: I used to like this game
reviews.review_description:
You’re wrong easy mode and you have five lives and you lose three and then you go all the way back to 29 years to retire it even though you still have 2 left.
You’re in deep combat, and then suddenly the screen goes black 
The game used to be good, but not and it’s current state and now updates come like every 10 months

developer_response.body: HI Officer Lathan. Sorry to hear that has happened to you. We haven't restarted anything our end.  We will look into why that has happened to you.

I shot my partner and the suspect bit con fused

developer_response.body: Hi Officer thanks for your support in getting through this backlog of Disturbance call outs❤️ the 'Mega' upgrades will give you the all out cutting edge, designed and worthy of the calibre of the Officer that owns them💥

It’s a good game overall but sometimes even if you do everything correctly it still will count as a fail also the spray does not work

developer_response.body: Hi we'll take a look into this, thanks for raising it. Have a great day

reviews.review_title: Good but hard & frustrating at times
reviews.review_description: I want to like this game more than I already do because it’s neat and it has funny scenarios and such and you have to respond to every situation properly but it’s frustrating when my crystal spray doesn’t work after I miss my taser and I fail because of it (even when i’m hitting right on the face). Also I think the “levels” are too long, I “retire” at 30? Maybe this is a skill issue on my part but I spent about 40 mins on this stressing the heck out when i got to the last 10 years and then I lost my last heart at 3 years and I just have to start all the way over (mind you i’m on the easy level to get the crystal spray) But idk, I’m glad  they added  an easy mode but I still struggle and I’m pretty upset I haven’t been able to get a weapon upgrade yet

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review officer. You now have 5 lives credited to you.   They will refresh every 10 years service.  Good luck out there Officer!

reviews.review_description: good game for its money! i’ve easily spent hours on this game but is there a way to regain hearts?

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review officer. You now have 5 lives credited to you.   They will refresh every 10 years service.  Good luck out there Officer!

reviews.review_description:
Picked this up on sale for a measley $5, which is such a great deal for what it is. You get tons of replayability and hours of entertainment for such a low cost. 

If I had to guess, I'd say there's around 30-40 different scenarios in the game, which is really great for replayability and it's all RNG. There's objectives to keep you wanting to play, and different modes for more of a challenge. I just know they could easily keep adding scenarios and different tools, and I hope they do! This one's a no brainer.

reviews.review_description: I love this game cause I wanna be a cop when I grow older. It’s really funny and I like the style of the game. You have a good choice of weapons and if your play space is big enough you can walk into the house. Sometimes the streets get crazy and sometimes a random guy pops up behind you during a disturbance and I love that stuff. It’s funny when they dance and there’s so much different scenarios 10/10

Super fun to mess around each scenario but the reset counter needs to be lowered a bit.

Enable movement as well.

Make your AI partner not die from a beer can as easily or at least fire back.
I don't know what crack yall did while making this game but take more of it. And add hand to hand combat
I’ve played the game for at least 40 minutes and I had so much fun with all the different situations
Soooooooo fun! It’s worth it for 5bucks
Really funny game and so many different scenes! Never know what will happen!! Defiantly worth the Money
It's like if I smoked shrooms, slammed my head into drywall, and then went on a police call
